author: Silent Sparrow
title: I feel like nobody notices me in class
body: Every day I sit in the back row and nobody talks to me. I raise my hand but the teacher never picks me. I know I'm quiet but it still hurts. Sometimes I wonder if I just stopped coming, would anyone even notice?

comments.author: Wandering Cloud
comments.text: I felt the same way last year. It gets better, I promise. Try talking to the person next to you — you might be surprised.

comments.author: Gentle Ghost
comments.text: You matter more than you think. Sending you strength 💙

author: Midnight Ink
title: My parents are getting divorced
body: They told us last week. My younger sister cried all night and I had to pretend I was okay so she wouldn't feel worse. I haven't told any of my friends because I don't want them to feel sorry for me. I just needed somewhere to say it.

comments.author: Broken Compass
comments.text: You're incredibly strong for being there for your sister. But remember it's okay to not be okay yourself.

comments.author: Fading Echo
comments.text: Been through the same thing two years ago. You can DM me if you ever want to talk. It's not the end, I promise.

comments.author: Pale Comet
comments.text: Sending a huge hug. You're not alone in this.

author: Quiet Storm
title: I cheated on the math exam and I feel terrible
body: The pressure from my parents to get good marks is insane. I copied from the person next to me during the unit test. I got 92 and everyone congratulated me but I feel like a fraud. I want to confess to the teacher but I'm terrified of the consequences.

comments.author: Hidden Flame
comments.text: The fact that you feel guilty means you have a good heart. Maybe study extra hard for the next one and let that be your redemption.

author: Forgotten Song
title: I have a crush on my best friend and it's eating me alive
body: We've been best friends since class 6. Lately every time they laugh or look at me I feel like my heart is going to explode. I can't tell them because what if it ruins everything? But keeping it inside is so painful.

comments.author: Nameless Star
comments.text: This is literally me right now. The struggle is SO real 😭

comments.author: Lone Petal
comments.text: Life is short. Tell them. Even if it's scary, you deserve to be honest with your feelings.

author: Paper Crane
title: My friend group is falling apart and idk what to do
body: Two of my closest friends had a massive fight last week and now everyone has to pick sides. I don't want to pick sides. I love both of them. But staying neutral is making everyone mad at me instead. It feels like I'm losing everyone.

comments.author: Dim Lantern
comments.text: Stay neutral. Real friends will respect that. The ones who force you to pick sides aren't worth it.

comments.author: Soft Thunder
comments.text: Going through the exact same thing. It's exhausting. Hang in there.

author: Hollow Moon
title: I'm scared I might have anxiety
body: My heart races before every class presentation. I can't sleep at night because my brain won't stop worrying about everything. My hands shake when I have to talk to new people. I googled the symptoms and everything matches but I don't know who to talk to about it.

comments.author: Silent Sparrow
comments.text: Please talk to a counselor. Our school has one and they're actually really chill. It helped me a lot.

comments.author: Gentle Ghost
comments.text: You're not alone. More people feel this way than you think. Acknowledging it is the first step 💪

comments.author: Midnight Ink
comments.text: Breathing exercises before sleep genuinely help. 4-7-8 method. Look it up.

author: Hidden Flame
title: I secretly write poetry and I'm too embarrassed to show anyone
body: I've been writing poems since class 7. I have three full notebooks. Some of them are about my life, some about made-up worlds. My friends would probably laugh if they knew. But writing is the only thing that makes me feel truly alive.

comments.author: Forgotten Song
comments.text: Please share some! Even anonymously here. Poetry is a gift, not something to be embarrassed about.

comments.author: Quiet Storm
comments.text: I do the same with drawing. Creative people understand each other. Keep writing!
